commands.repair_reason: Manual review is appropriate because the protected maintainer label and current-main overlap require deciding whether to carry gateway-side compatibility in addition to the existing UI fix.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain issue found; the diff touches config validation/persistence only and adds no dependencies, workflows, downloads, or secret sources. (sha=ec2dccb75523747f7af9bced0856b52ff3e249f8)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds gateway config.set/apply handling that strips default-only empty bundled provider baseUrl/models before persistence, adds an RPC regression test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the gateway-level case from source: current main validates config.set payloads against baseUrl minLength while runtime snapshots can contain baseUrl: "". The original Control UI user path is already covered by current-main UI sourceConfig submission.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is appropriate because the protected maintainer label and current-main overlap require deciding whether to carry gateway-side compatibility in addition to the existing UI fix.
